name: Heath Bar Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter, sugar, and chopped nuts in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Stir constantly until the mixture thickens and forms a caramel-like consistency.
3. Pour the mixture onto a greased cookie sheet.
4. Sprinkle chocolate chips evenly over the top of the cooled caramel.
5. Allow the candy to cool and harden completely.
6. Break into pieces once firm.
